name: 0nmcp
description: 564 tools across 26 services in 13 categories. Stripe, Slack, Discord, SendGrid, GitHub, Shopify, Gmail, Google Sheets, Jira, Zendesk, and more. Natural language AI orchestration with Vault encryption, Business Deed transfer, and Application Engine.

npm.description: Run the 0nMCP server using Node.js npx

examples.title: Multi-Service Orchestration
examples.description: Invoice a customer and notify a Slack channel
examples.prompt: Invoice john@acme.com for $500 and notify #sales on Slack when it's sent

examples.title: Service Connection
examples.description: Connect to a service with your API key
examples.prompt: Connect to Stripe with key sk_live_xxx

examples.title: CRM Management
examples.prompt: Look up sarah@example.com in my CRM and send her a follow-up email
